# `fill`

**Systems:** GAMEBOY,Z80, Z180  
**Parameters:** `a,b,i`

---

<div markdown="0" class="trse-help-body">

<h3>Fill( [address], [byte 1], [byte 2] );</h3>
<ul>
    <li>[address] - address to fill from</li>
    <li>[byte 1] - fill memory with this value</li>
    <li>[byte 2] - number of bytes to fill</li>
</ul>


<h3>Description</h3>
<p>Fills an area of memory with a value for the specified number of bytes.</p>


<h3>Example</h3>

<code>
fill( ^$D800, 0, 40 ); // Fill 40 chars of zeroes (0, black) at the start of color ram $D800 (first row)

// zp is a pointer, point to a specific character in a charset and fill 8 bytes with value 255
zp := charset + ^@myCharVal;
fill( zp, 255, 8 );
</code>


</div>
